doctest/DocTest/lineno.name: lineno
doctest/DocTest/lineno.description: The line number within filename where this DocTest begins, or None if the line number is unavailable. This line number is zero-based with respect to the beginning of the file.

info.excerpt: The line number within filename where this DocTest begins, or None if the line number is unavailable. This line number is zero-based with respect to the beginning of the file.

doctest/Example/lineno.name: lineno
doctest/Example/lineno.description: The line number within the string containing this example where the example begins. This line number is zero-based with respect to the beginning of the containing string.

info.excerpt: The line number within the string containing this example where the example begins. This line number is zero-based with respect to the beginning of the containing string.
